task_completion.description: Create a transformed variable named 'AgeGroup' from the 'age' variable, binning into 'Child' and 'Adult'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jamovi data spreadsheet showing a new column named 'AgeGroup' containing the text values 'Child' and 'Adult'.

task_completion.description: Set up the contingency table analysis with 'AgeGroup' as rows and 'survived' as columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jamovi analysis setup panel for 'Contingency Tables' showing 'AgeGroup' placed in the 'Rows' box and 'survived' placed in the 'Columns' box.

task_completion.description: Include Chi-square and Odds ratio measures in the contingency table analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jamovi results panel displaying the Contingency Tables output, specifically showing sections for 'Chi-Square Tests' and 'Comparative Measures' with an 'Odds Ratio' value (expected to be ~1.751).

Jamovi window title displaying 'Titanic_Age_Analysis.omv', a save dialog confirming this filename, or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists at '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Titanic_Age_Analysis.omv'.

task_completion.description: Record the numeric Odds Ratio value in 'survival_odds.txt'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/survival_odds.txt' containing a numeric value around 1.75.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the data transformation and analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show active interaction with the Jamovi interface (e.g., transformation dialogs, analysis menus) rather than using terminal commands or Python/R scripts to bypass the application.

integrity.description: Verify the analysis results are genuinely generated by Jamovi.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results panel should feature the standard Jamovi formatting, tables, and layout for Contingency Tables, rather than being manually typed or fabricated.

integrity.description: Verify the recorded Odds Ratio matches the actual analysis output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric value saved in 'survival_odds.txt' must match the Odds Ratio value displayed in the Jamovi results panel.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Odds Ratio is approximately 1.751 (acceptable range with 5% tolerance: 1.663 to 1.838). The contingency table should reflect Adult (546 no, 346 yes) and Child (73 no, 81 yes). The Jamovi project must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Titanic_Age_Analysis.omv' and the text file to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/survival_odds.txt'.
